qa_pairs.question: What tourist attractions can you get to exactly by shuttle?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT tourist_attractions.tourist_attraction_id FROM tourist_attractions
WHERE tourist_attractions.how_to_get_there = 'shuttle'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which tourist attractions entities with how to get there equal to 'shuttle'?

SELECT tourist_attractions.tourist_attraction_id FROM tourist_attractions
JOIN ref_attraction_types ON tourist_attractions.attraction_type_code = ref_attraction_types.attraction_type_code
JOIN locations ON tourist_attractions.location_id = locations.location_id
JOIN photos ON tourist_attractions.tourist_attraction_id = photos.tourist_attraction_id
WHERE photos.name = 'din3' AND locations.address = '0692 Georgiana Pass' AND ref_attraction_types.attraction_type_description = 'museum' AND tourist_attractions.how_to_get_there = 'walk' AND tourist_attractions.name = 'history gallery' AND locations.location_name = 'The Boneyard' AND photos.filename = '864'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which tourist attractions entities with how to get there equal to 'walk' and name equal to 'history gallery', having at least one related ref attraction types record (linked on tourist_attractions.attraction_type_code = ref_attraction_types.attraction_type_code) with attraction type description equal to 'museum', having at least one related locations record (linked on tourist_attractions.location_id = locations.location_id) with address equal to '0692 Georgiana Pass' and location name equal to 'The Boneyard', having at least one related photos record (linked on tourist_attractions.tourist_attraction_id = photos.tourist_attraction_id) with name equal to 'din3' and filename equal to '864'?

qa_pairs.question: What galleries named film festival are located at 88271 Barrows Union Suite 203 in African Adventure, where you can get there by bus and the staff includes Carmella?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT tourist_attractions.tourist_attraction_id FROM tourist_attractions
JOIN ref_attraction_types ON tourist_attractions.attraction_type_code = ref_attraction_types.attraction_type_code
JOIN locations ON tourist_attractions.location_id = locations.location_id

qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT tourist_attractions.tourist_attraction_id FROM tourist_attractions
